overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a Kang Tao aerial vehicle on a neon-lit landing pad in Night City. The camera smoothly circles the vehicle as it prepares for takeoff, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with vibrant holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop landing pad with illuminated hazard markings

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching and circling the stationary Kang Tao aerial vehicle on the landing pad

entered.detail: large black and red corporate aerial vehicle with glowing blue thrusters and Kang Tao branding
towering futuristic skyscrapers with colorful holographic advertisements and neon signs
concrete platform with glowing yellow and red hazard markings and circular patterns
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic rooftop landing pad in Night City at dusk. A large Kang Tao aerial vehicle sits stationary on the illuminated pad, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The camera slowly circles the vehicle while palm trees sway gently in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: landing pad with building entrance stairs visible behind the vehicle

events.description: camera passes underneath the large aerial vehicle, temporarily blocking the view of the sky and skyline
revealing building entrance with illuminated stairs as camera emerges on the far side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing to circle around the vehicle, passing underneath and revealing the building entrance behind

entered.detail: illuminated staircase leading up into the building structure behind the landing pad

segments.scene_description: The camera continues circling clockwise around the vehicle, moving underneath its massive hull which temporarily obscures the sky. As the camera emerges on the opposite side, a building entrance with illuminated stairs becomes visible behind the landing pad, while the palm trees now appear on the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open landing pad with departing aerial vehicle

events.description: Kang Tao aerial vehicle activates thrusters and lifts off vertically from the landing pad
vehicle ascends into the skyline and a small distant flyer becomes visible among the buildings

agents.ego_description: watching the aerial vehicle take off and depart, then observing the empty landing pad and cityscape

notable_agents.action: Kang Tao aerial vehicle ascending vertically from the landing pad with glowing blue thrusters

entered.detail: small aerial vehicle flying in the distance among the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The Kang Tao vehicle activates its thrusters and lifts off the pad, ascending into the dusk sky. The camera tracks its departure as it rises above the neon-lit skyline, revealing additional flying traffic in the distance. The vehicle eventually flies away leaving the illuminated landing pad empty against the backdrop of the towering city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement around a futuristic aerial vehicle that begins stationary on a rooftop and ends as a distant speck in the neon skyline. It begins with a slow clockwise circle around the Kang Tao vehicle on an illuminated landing pad, with swaying palm trees and towering skyscrapers framing the dusk horizon. As the camera glides further, it passes beneath the massive hull of the craft, momentarily blocking the sky before emerging to reveal an illuminated building entrance and stairs behind the pad. The scene then shifts as the vehicle activates its thrusters and ascends, with the camera tracking its climb above the vibrant advertisements of Night City. Finally, the vehicle merges with the distant flying traffic and disappears into the city expanse, leaving the glowing landing pad empty against the backdrop of the towering metropolis.
